title: Fazza Play - Home
pc_games_slogan: The most powerful PC games await you
mobile_games_slogan: The best mobile games in your pocket
footer_disclaimer: Disclaimer: This site is a game directory and does not host any files. All download links direct to official stores. We support original developers.
about_story_p: Welcome to Fazza Play. Our site specializes in providing PC games in an organized and secure manner. We are a team of two people, brought together by a passion for the world of games. We faced the same challenges that any game lover faces: broken links, sites full of annoying ads, and sometimes unsafe files. From here, our idea began. We said to ourselves: why don't we create a simple, tidy site that offers the games we love, but in a safe and easy way for everyone. We started working on the site with one goal: to provide a library of PC and mobile games that is reliable, easy to download, and suitable for all users.
about_mission_p: We help every player get to the game they love easily, without trouble, worry, or even wasting a lot of time. We are constantly working to improve the visitor experience and update the content periodically to ensure that the site always remains useful and reliable.
about_team_p: Our team consists of two people. We divide the work between writing and content, organizing games, designing the layout of the pages, and testing each game before uploading it to ensure its quality.
contact_p: We are happy to hear from you! If you have any questions or suggestions, please fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
privacy_intro_p: At Fazza Play, the privacy of our visitors is of extreme importance to us. This privacy policy document outlines the types of personal information is received and collected by Fazza Play and how it is used.
privacy_log_files_p: Like many other Web sites, Fazza Play makes use of log files. The information inside the log files includes internet protocol (IP) addresses, type of browser, Internet Service Provider (ISP), date/time stamp, referring/exit pages, and number of clicks to analyze trends, administer the site, track user’s movement around the site, and gather demographic information. IP addresses, and other such information are not linked to any information that is personally identifiable.
privacy_cookies_p: Fazza Play does use cookies to store information about visitors preferences, record user-specific information on which pages the user access or visit, customize Web page content based on visitors browser type or other information that the visitor sends via their browser.
privacy_dart_li1: Advertising companies, as third party vendors, use cookies to serve ads on Fazza Play.
privacy_dart_li2: The use of advertising cookies enables these companies to serve ads to users based on their visit to Fazza Play and other sites on the Internet.
privacy_dart_li3: Users may opt out of the use of advertising cookies by adjusting their browser settings or visiting the privacy policies of advertising companies.
privacy_partners_p1: Some of our advertising partners may use cookies and web beacons on our site. Our main advertising partner is:
privacy_partners_p2: These third-party ad servers or ad networks use technology to the advertisements and links that appear on Fazza Play send directly to your browsers. They automatically receive your IP address when this occurs. Other technologies ( such as cookies, JavaScript, or Web Beacons ) may also be used by the third-party ad networks to measure the effectiveness of their advertisements and / or to personalize the advertising content that you see.
privacy_partners_p3: Fazza Play has no access to or control over these cookies that are used by third-party advertisers.
privacy_partners_p4: You should consult the respective privacy policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information on their practices as well as for instructions about how to opt-out of certain practices. Fazza Play's privacy policy does not apply to, and we cannot control the activities of, such other advertisers or web sites.
privacy_consent_p: By using our website, you hereby consent to our privacy policy and agree to its terms.
privacy_update_p: This Privacy Policy was last updated on: June 20th, 2025. Should we update, amend or make any changes to our privacy policy, those changes will be posted here.
terms_h1: Terms of Use for Fazza Play
terms_intro_p: Welcome to Fazza Play. These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of our website. By accessing this website, we assume you accept these terms and conditions in full. Do not continue to use Fazza Play's website if you do not accept all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.
terms_ip_p1: Other than the content you own, which you may have opted to include on this Website, under these Terms, Fazza Play and/or its licensors own all rights to the intellectual property and material contained in this Website, and all such rights are reserved.
terms_ip_p2: You are granted a limited license only, subject to the restrictions provided in these Terms, for purposes of viewing the material contained on this Website.
terms_restrictions_p: You are expressly and emphatically restricted from all of the following:
terms_restrictions_li1: Publishing any Website material in any media.
terms_restrictions_li2: Selling, sublicensing and/or otherwise commercializing any Website material.
terms_restrictions_li3: Using this Website in any way that is, or may be, damaging to this Website.
terms_restrictions_li4: Using this Website contrary to applicable laws and regulations, or in a way that causes, or may cause, harm to the Website, or to any person or business entity.
terms_restrictions_li5: Engaging in any data mining, data harvesting, data extracting or any other similar activity in relation to this Website.
terms_disclaimer_p: This Website is provided "as is," with all faults, and Fazza Play makes no express or implied representations or warranties, of any kind related to this Website or the materials contained on this Website. Additionally, nothing contained on this Website shall be construed as providing consult or advice to you.
terms_liability_p: In no event shall Fazza Play, nor any of its officers, directors and employees, be liable to you for anything arising out of or in any way connected with your use of this Website, whether such liability is under contract, tort or otherwise.
terms_law_p: These Terms will be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of your country, and you submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts for the resolution of any disputes.
terms_changes_p: Fazza Play is permitted to revise these Terms at any time as it sees fit, and by using this Website you are expected to review such Terms on a regular basis to ensure you understand all terms and conditions governing use of this Website.
cookies_intro_p: This Cookie Policy explains how Fazza Play uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.
cookies_what_p: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.
cookies_types_p: We use the following types of cookies:
cookies_essential_p: These cookies are essential to provide you with services available through our website and to enable you to use some of its features.
cookies_analytics_p: These cookies allow us to analyze how our website is being accessed and used, and enable us to track performance of our site.
cookies_advertising_p: These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests.
tiktok_subtitle: Paste the video link and click download.
tiktok_hint: Supports short and long video links.
